name: Plasmid Maxiprep (Alkaline Lysis)

components.name: 1. 过夜培养 100–500 mL LB + 抗性
3. 重悬 (Buffer P1/Resuspension)
components.note: 含 RNase A, 彻底重悬无颗粒

components.name: 4. 碱裂解 (Buffer P2/Lysis)
components.note: 轻柔翻转 4–6 次, 室温 ≤5 min

components.name: 5. 中和 (Buffer P3/Neutralization)
components.note: 立即翻转混匀, 冰上 15–20 min

components.name: 12. 70% 乙醇洗涤 → 风干 → TE 溶解

notes.en: Typical yield: 100 mL high-copy plasmid culture → 500-1000 µg DNA. Endotoxin-free plasmid for transfection/in vivo use requires endotoxin removal column. Avoid excessive vortexing to prevent genomic DNA contamination.
notes.zh: 典型产量：100 mL 高拷贝质粒 → 500–1000 µg DNA。Endotoxin-free 质粒用于转染/体内实验需使用 endotoxin removal column。避免过度涡旋导致基因组 DNA 污染。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd Ed; QIAGEN Plasmid Purification Handbook

usage.en: Isolate large-scale, high-purity plasmid DNA from E. coli cultures for transfection.
usage.zh: 大量提取高纯度质粒 DNA，用于转染等应用。

briefSteps.en: Grow 100–500 mL culture overnight → pellet bacteria → alkaline lysis (P1/P2/P3) → centrifuge → bind to column → wash twice → elute → isopropanol precipitate → wash → dissolve in TE → quantify
briefSteps.zh: 100–500 mL 过夜培养 → 离心收菌 → 碱裂解（P1/P2/P3）→ 离心 → 上柱结合 → 洗涤 2 次 → 洗脱 → 异丙醇沉淀 → 洗涤 → TE 溶解 → 定量

detailedSteps.en: Day 1: Inoculate a single confirmed colony into 5 mL LB + antibiotic; grow at 37°C, 225 rpm for 6–8 h, then transfer to 100–500 mL LB + antibiotic and continue overnight (12–16 h).
detailedSteps.zh: 第1天：挑单克隆接种至 5 mL LB + 抗生素，37°C、225 rpm 培养 6–8 h，再转接至 100–500 mL LB + 抗生素过夜培养 12–16 h。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2 — Pellet bacteria by centrifugation at 6,000×g for 15 min at 4°C; discard supernatant completely.
detailedSteps.zh: 第2天 — 4°C、6,000×g 离心 15 min 收集菌体，彻底弃去上清。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend the pellet in Buffer P1 (containing RNase A) at 4 mL per gram wet cell weight; pipette until fully homogeneous with no visible clumps.
detailedSteps.zh: 用含 RNase A 的 Buffer P1 重悬菌体（4 mL/g 湿重），反复吹打至无可见颗粒，完全均匀。

detailedSteps.en: Add an equal volume of Buffer P2 (0.2 M NaOH, 1% SDS); gently invert 4–6 times and incubate at room temperature for exactly 3–5 min until solution turns clear and viscous. Do NOT vortex.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入等体积 Buffer P2（0.2 M NaOH、1% SDS），轻柔颠倒 4–6 次，室温静置 3–5 min 至溶液变清亮黏稠，切勿涡旋。

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.75 volumes of pre-chilled Buffer P3 (3 M potassium acetate, pH 5.5); immediately invert 4–6 times, then incubate on ice for 15–20 min until a large white precipitate forms.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 0.75 倍体积预冷 Buffer P3（3 M 乙酸钾，pH 5.5），立即颠倒混匀 4–6 次，冰浴 15–20 min 至形成大量白色沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 20,000×g for 30 min at 4°C to pellet cellular debris. Filter the supernatant through gauze if needed.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、20,000×g 离心 30 min 沉淀细胞碎片，如需可通过纱布过滤上清。

detailedSteps.en: Equilibrate the maxiprep column with the provided equilibration buffer (QBT or equivalent); apply the cleared supernatant and allow it to flow through by gravity.
detailedSteps.zh: 用平衡缓冲液（QBT 或等效液）平衡大提柱，将澄清上清液上柱，重力流过。

detailedSteps.en: Wash the column twice with wash buffer (QC or equivalent), 30–60 mL per wash, allowing complete drainage by gravity between washes.
detailedSteps.zh: 用洗涤缓冲液（QC 或等效液）洗柱 2 次，每次 30–60 mL，每次重力排尽后再洗。

detailedSteps.en: Elute DNA with 15 mL elution buffer (QF or equivalent) pre-warmed to 65°C; collect eluate in a 50 mL tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 15 mL 预热至 65°C 的洗脱缓冲液（QF 或等效液）洗脱 DNA，收集洗脱液于 50 mL 离心管。

detailedSteps.en: Precipitate DNA by adding 0.7 volumes (~10.5 mL) of room-temperature isopropanol; mix well and incubate at −20°C for 30 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 0.7 倍体积（约 10.5 mL）室温异丙醇，充分混匀，−20°C 孵育 30 min 沉淀 DNA。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 15,000×g for 30 min at 4°C; carefully decant supernatant. A white or translucent pellet should be visible.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、15,000×g 离心 30 min，小心倒去上清，应可见白色或半透明沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Wash the pellet with 5 mL of 70% ethanol; centrifuge at 15,000×g for 5 min at 4°C and remove supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 5 mL 70% 乙醇洗涤沉淀，4°C、15,000×g 离心 5 min，去除上清。

detailedSteps.en: Air-dry the pellet at room temperature for 10–15 min, then dissolve in 200–500 µL TE buffer (pH 8.0). Heat at 65°C for 5 min to aid dissolution if needed.
detailedSteps.zh: 室温风干沉淀 10–15 min，用 200–500 µL TE 缓冲液（pH 8.0）溶解；如需可 65°C 加热 5 min 助溶。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify by NanoDrop: A260/280 ≈ 1.8, A260/230 > 2.0. Expected yield: 500–1000 µg from 100 mL high-copy plasmid culture.
detailedSteps.zh: NanoDrop 定量：A260/280 ≈ 1.8，A260/230 > 2.0。100 mL 高拷贝质粒培养物预期产量 500–1000 µg。

note.en: Bacterial pellet can be snap-frozen and stored at −80°C for up to 1 month before lysis.
note.zh: 菌体沉淀可速冻后 −80°C 保存最多 1 个月后再裂解。

note.en: Purified plasmid DNA can be stored at −20°C indefinitely or at 4°C for several months.
note.zh: 纯化的质粒 DNA 可 −20°C 长期保存，或 4°C 保存数月。
